name: testCheckUncheckOneVisibleColumn
description: Check/Uncheck Visible columns in the Settings and verify table column headers
descriptionHtml: Check/Uncheck Visible columns in the Settings and verify table column headers
statusMessage:

steps.name: Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0813.013913.26.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

Verify: Only one column header is NOT displayed in the Transactions
